title: Holiday Countdown
description: Built-in Chinese holidays (incl. lunar) + custom birthdays / anniversaries; live "N days HH:MM" on every card, auto-rolls to next year
disclaimer: Lunar holiday dates are precomputed for 2026–2030; out-of-range entries are hidden. For precise dates, add your own custom entry.

form.title: Add a custom date
form.recurringHint: Birthdays / anniversaries. Untick for a one-off event (disappears once past).

card.outOfRange: Past or out of data range

empty: No countdowns yet — add a custom date or restore a built-in holiday
